chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-4365 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For orders on CMA No.19463/2025. 10.10.2025. Hafiz Abdul Baqi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Syed Bashir Hussain Shah, DAG. Deputy Director FIA Azhar Jawaid along with Muhammad Amjad, Deputy Director, Inspector Zarina Ishaq, ASI Mateen, ASI Ejaz of Immigration Airport, Karachi. --------------- Mr. Azhar Jawid, Deputy Director, FIA Immigration Department, Karachi is in attendance and submits that the Petitioner No.1’s travel had earlier been curtailed as the requirement of “Okay Boarding Stamp” had not been endorsed by the relevant airline. However, he states that the Petitioner has since traveled out of Pakistan. Learned counsel for the Petitioner also confirms this to be so. As such, the purpose of the application appears to have been served. The same stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyde/PS*
